name: 7 Mile Rollin 60s Crips
description: The 7 Mile Rollin' 60s Crips (7M R$C) are one of Detroit's older and more historically recognizable Crip sets, predominantly African American, formed around 2006 and operating along Seven Mile Road. They grew to an estimated 150 members at their peak and retain influence within the larger Detroit Rollin Neighborhood Crips structure. Federal authorities targeted the set through ATF-led RICO prosecutions stemming from their prolonged conflict with the Playboy Gangster Crips.
